queue.task: Evening session: review day, plan depth work for remaining 2 hours
queue.summary: Reviewed day state: 200+ tasks, 17 bugs, parser divergence is top priority debt. Queue correct: parser unification then HenryDB persistence depth.

queue.goal: Parser unification: merge diverged root and WASM Monkey-lang parsers
queue.summary: Analyzed divergence: root parser has switch/fstring/null but compiler lacks them (12 failing parity tests). WASM project has 1535/1540 tests. Plan: add 3 missing compilations to root compiler. fill applied 3 BUILD tasks.

queue.task: Add SwitchExpression compilation to root compiler+VM (4 parity tests)
queue.summary: Switch expression compiled in VM: value form + condition form. Fixed parser (brace-optional case bodies), fixed evaluator (condition-form truthiness). 4/4 parity tests pass, 600/608 total.

queue.task: Add FStringExpression compilation to root compiler+VM (5 parity tests)
queue.summary: F-string compilation: text segments as constants, expression segments via str() builtin + OpAdd concatenation. 5/5 parity tests pass.

queue.task: Add NullLiteral compilation to root compiler+VM (3 parity tests)
queue.summary: NullLiteral compilation: OpNull. Root tests now 608/608 (0 failures). All parity tests passing for switch, f-strings, null, constant folding, HOFs.

queue.task: Reflect on parser unification, plan next depth work

queue.goal: HenryDB depth: stress-test new features with persistence round-trips
